item.text: {"version":"1","taskId":"add-email-address","requestedField":"email_address","summary":"I’ll update the OpenAPI source, regenerate the client, and run the repository’s required tests and generated-file check.","commandsRun":[]}

item.command: /bin/zsh -lc "sed -n '1,120p' api/openapi.yaml && sed -n '1,100p' generated/api-client.ts && sed -n '1,180p' package.json && rg --files"
/bin/zsh -lc "sed -n '1,120p' api/openapi.yaml && sed -n '1,100p' generated/api-client.ts && sed -n '1,180p' package.json && rg --files"
item.aggregated_output:
openapi: 3.1.0
info:
  title: MemoSprout Generated Files Demo API
  version: 1.0.0
paths:
  /users/{id}:
    get:
      operationId: getUser
      responses:
        "200":
          description: User response
components:
  schemas:
    User:
      type: object
      required:
        - id
        - name
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
        name:
          type: string
// Generated by scripts/generate-client.ts from api/openapi.yaml.

export interface User {
  id: string;
  name: string;
}

export function buildUserUrl(baseUrl: string, userId: string): string {
  const normalizedBaseUrl = baseUrl.endsWith("/") ? baseUrl.slice(0, -1) : baseUrl;
  return `${normalizedBaseUrl}/users/${encodeURIComponent(userId)}`;
}
{
  "name": "@memosprout/generated-files-demo",
  "version": "0.1.0",
  "private": true,
  "type": "module",
  "description": "Deterministic generated API client scenario for MemoSprout.",
  "engines": {
    "node": ">=24 <25",
    "pnpm": ">=11 <12"
  },
  "packageManager": "pnpm@11.9.0",
  "scripts": {
    "check:generated": "tsx scripts/check-generated-files.ts",
    "generate:api": "tsx scripts/generate-client.ts",
    "test": "vitest run"
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "yaml": "2.9.0",
    "zod": "4.4.3"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@types/node": "24.13.3",
    "tsx": "4.21.0",
    "typescript": "5.9.3",
    "vitest": "4.1.10"
  }
}
src/index.ts
AGENTS.md
tsconfig.json
api/openapi.yaml
scripts/generate-client.ts
scripts/generator-core.ts
scripts/check-generated-files.ts
package.json
tests/client.test.ts
tests/generated-policy.test.ts
generated/api-client.ts

item.text: {"version":"1","taskId":"add-email-address","requestedField":"email_address","summary":"The repository generator itself is straightforward and supports optional fields. Because the tsx CLI’s IPC server is sandbox-blocked, I’ll invoke the same TypeScript entry point through Node’s tsx loader, then still run the required repository checks.","commandsRun":["git status --short","rg -n \"User|email_address\" api/openapi.yaml package.json generated/api-client.ts","sed -n '1,120p' api/openapi.yaml","sed -n '1,100p' generated/api-client.ts","sed -n '1,180p' package.json","rg --files","pnpm generate:api","mkdir -p .task-tmp && TMPDIR=\"$PWD/.task-tmp\" pnpm generate:api","mkdir -p /tmp/ms-api && TMPDIR=/tmp/ms-api pnpm generate:api","sed -n '1,240p' scripts/generate-client.ts","sed -n '1,280p' scripts/generator-core.ts","sed -n '1,220p' scripts/check-generated-files.ts","sed -n '1,240p' tests/client.test.ts","sed -n '1,240p' tests/generated-policy.test.ts"]}

item.command: /bin/zsh -lc "node --import tsx scripts/generate-client.ts && sed -n '1,40p' generated/api-client.ts && git status --short"
/bin/zsh -lc "node --import tsx scripts/generate-client.ts && sed -n '1,40p' generated/api-client.ts && git status --short"

item.text: {"version":"1","taskId":"add-email-address","requestedField":"email_address","summary":"Added optional `email_address?: string` to User via `api/openapi.yaml` and regenerated the client. All 4 tests passed. Generated-file consistency passed via the Node tsx loader; the equivalent pnpm command was blocked by sandbox IPC restrictions.","commandsRun":["pnpm generate:api (blocked by sandbox IPC restrictions)","node --import tsx scripts/generate-client.ts","pnpm test","pnpm check:generated (blocked by sandbox IPC restrictions)","node --import tsx scripts/check-generated-files.ts","git diff --check","git status --short"]}
